## Spec & decisions

- [ ] The spec governing this area is **up to date** (updated _before_ the code, per the spec-first workflow).
- [ ] New public API? A `spec.md` exists for the package/service.
- [ ] Structural decision made? An ADR was added under `adr/`.

## Checks

- [ ] `bun run check` passes locally (same command CI runs).
- [ ] No new cross-package imports from `internal/`.
- [ ] New packages/services include their own `CLAUDE.md`.
